sip.title: Kelepona SIP

incoming.heading: Nā kāhea SIP e hiki mai ana
incoming.lead: ʻO kahi helu SIP kū hoʻokahi no ka hoʻouna ʻana i nā kelepona kūwaho mai kāu mea hoʻolako i ka ʻōnaehana VibeVox.
incoming.emptyTitle: ʻAʻole i hana ʻia ka helu wahi SIP e komo mai ana
incoming.emptyHint: E hana i kahi SIP URI + login/password kūikawā i hiki i nā mea kūʻai aku ke kelepona iā ʻoe mai kekahi kelepona, a e unuhi aunoa ʻo VibeVox i kou leo i ka manawa maoli.
incoming.create: E hana i kahi helu wahi SIP no nā kelepona e hiki mai ana
incoming.active: Ke loaʻa mai nei nā kelepona e hiki mai ana.
incoming.paused: Ua hana ʻia ka helu wahi SIP, ua hoʻōki ʻia ka hoʻokipa ʻana
incoming.activeHint: Hoʻolohe ka mea unuhi Bridge i ka lumi. Unuhi ʻia kēlā me kēia kelepona i ka manawa maoli.
incoming.pausedHint: E hoʻā i ka hoʻokipa e hoʻomaka ai ʻo VibeVox e unuhi i nā kelepona e hiki mai ana.
incoming.createdToast: Ua hana ʻia ka helu wahi SIP e komo mai ana
incoming.deletedToast: Ua wehe ʻia ka helu wahi SIP e komo mai ana
incoming.createFailed: ʻAʻole i hana ʻia ka helu wahi SIP
incoming.deleteFailed: ʻAʻole i holo pono ka holoi ʻana
incoming.stopped: Ua hoʻōki ʻia ka hoʻokipa ʻana
incoming.toggleFailed: ʻAʻole i kūleʻa ke hoʻololi i ka hoʻokipa

outbound.heading: Kāhea puka
outbound.lead: Kāhea i kahi helu kelepona mai ka pūnaewele a e unuhi aunoa ʻo VibeVox i kāu kamaʻilio ʻana i ka manawa maoli.
outbound.noTrunkTitle: ʻO ka mea mua, e hoʻonohonoho i kahi SIP Trunk puka i waho
outbound.noTrunkHint: E hoʻopiha i ka palapala "New SIP Trunk" ma ka piko o ka ʻaoʻao - e hoʻohana ʻo VibeVox i kāu mea lawelawe SIP (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk, FreePBX, a pēlā aku) no nā kelepona i waho.
outbound.languageLabel: ʻŌlelo a ka mea e loaʻa ana ke kelepona
outbound.configureFirst: ʻO ka mea mua, e hoʻonohonoho i kahi SIP Trunk puka i waho (palapala ma luna)
outbound.invalidNumber: E ʻoluʻolu e hoʻokomo i ka helu kūpono ma ke ʻano honua (+XXXXXXXXXXXX)
outbound.calling: Ke kāhea aku nei mākou iā {{number}}…
outbound.callFailed: ʻAʻole i hiki ke kāhea aku

howTo.heading: Pehea e hoʻonohonoho ai
howTo.step1: E kiʻi i nā palapala hōʻoia SIP Trunk mai kāu mea lawelawe (Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk).
howTo.step2: E hoʻokomo iā lākou ma ke ʻano ma luna a mālama.
howTo.step3: E hana aunoa ʻo VibeVox i kahi SIP Trunk i waho ma LiveKit Cloud.
howTo.step4: E hiki koke mai ana: URI SIP e hiki mai ana no ka hoʻouna ʻana i nā kelepona o waho.

tenantOnly.title: Hoʻonohonoho ʻia nā SIP Trunk ma ka pae mea hoʻolimalima
tenantOnly.hint1: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻonohonoho ʻia ke kelepona SIP ma lalo o kahi moʻokāki superadmin (me ka ʻole o kahi UUID-tenant).
tenantOnly.hint2: E komo ma ke ʻano he mea hoʻohana maʻamau nona kā lākou tenantId ponoʻī e hana i kahi Trunk.

sip.connected: Ua mālama ʻia ka SIP Trunk a ua hoʻonohonoho pū ʻia me LiveKit

sections.providerData: Nā kikoʻī no kāu mea hoʻolako SIP

danger.deleteTrunkHint: E holoi ʻia ka hoʻonohonoho ʻana. E pau nā kelepona i waho a hiki i kou hana hou ʻana i ka Trunk.
danger.deleteInbound: Wehe i ka helu wahi SIP no nā kelepona e hiki mai ana
danger.deleteInboundHint: E wehe ʻia ka LiveKit inbound Trunk a me ka dispatch rule. ʻAʻole e loaʻa hou nā kelepona e komo mai ana.
danger.reissueHint: E hoʻopuka hou i ka inoa komo a me ka ʻōlelo huna no ka helu wahi SIP. ʻAʻole e hana hou ka ʻike kahiko.

outbound2.rateInfo: Hoʻoholo ʻia ke kumukūʻai no kēlā me kēia minuke o kahi kāhea puka aku e kāu mea lawelawe SIP.

confirm.deleteTrunkBody: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻihoʻi ʻia kēia hana. Ke holoi ʻia, e pau nā kelepona i waho a hiki i ka hana ʻia ʻana o kahi Trunk hou.
confirm.deleteInboundTitle: Wehe i ka helu wahi SIP no ka mea e komo mai ana?
confirm.deleteInboundBody: ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻihoʻi ʻia kēia hana. E holoi ʻia ka inbound Trunk a me ka dispatch rule ma LiveKit Cloud.

page.title: Nā Hoʻonohonoho ʻOihana
page.subtitle: Nā hoʻohui āpau, nā kī, a me nā palena AI no kāu moʻokāki
page.upsellTitle: Loaʻa kēia ʻāpana ma ka hoʻolālā Enterprise.
page.upsellBody: Maanei hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻonohonoho: kahi kī API Gemini pilikino, kahi Prompt a me ka waihona ʻike, hoʻohui pū me ka bot Quest Flow + Telegram, a me ka hoʻopili ʻana iā Chatwoot CRM.

gemini.heading: Kī API Google Gemini
gemini.lead: He kī pilikino mai AI Studio. Hoʻololi kēia i ke kī honua no nā kelepona Gemini āpau ma kāu moʻokāki.
gemini.leadSuffix: Hoʻohana ʻia ma kahi o ka mea honua no nā kelepona Gemini āpau ma kāu moʻokāki.
gemini.statusQuotaExceeded: Ua ʻoi aku ka nui o ka quota
gemini.errEnterKey: E hoʻokomo i kāu kī API Gemini
gemini.successSavedValidated: Ua mālama ʻia a ua hōʻoia ʻia ke kī - ke hana nei.
gemini.successSavedWithIssue: Ua mālama ʻia, akā ke hōʻoia nei: {{error}}
gemini.successValid: Kūpono ke kī - loaʻa ka Gemini API.
gemini.successDeleted: Ua wehe ʻia ke kī no ka mea hoʻolimalima.
gemini.confirmDeleteTitle: Wehe i ke kī Gemini no kēlā me kēia mea hoʻolimalima?
gemini.confirmDeleteBody: E hoʻohana nā hana AI i ke kī i kaʻana like ʻia e VibeVox (inā i hoʻonohonoho ʻia).

telegram.heading: ʻO ka bot Telegram no nā leka hoʻomaopopo
telegram.lead: E hana i kahi bot me @BotFather a hoʻokomo i kāna hōʻailona. ʻO kēlā me kēia mea e leka i kēia bot me /start e loaʻa nā leka hoʻomaopopo: nā mea kūʻai aku hou, nā lepili, nā hewa hoʻohui. Hiki iā ʻoe ke kau inoa i nā limahana he nui a hoʻohui paha i ka bot i kahi hui a i ʻole ke kahawai—e hoʻouna ʻia nā leka hoʻomaopopo i nā mea āpau me ka ʻakomi.
telegram.leadCreatePart1: E hana i kahi bot ma
telegram.leadAllWhoStart: ʻO nā mea a pau e kākau ana i kēia bot
telegram.leadAfterStart: , e loaʻa nā leka hoʻomaopopo e pili ana i nā mea kūʻai aku hou, nā lepili, a me nā hewa hoʻohui. Hiki iā ʻoe ke kau inoa i nā limahana he nui a hoʻohui paha i ka bot i kahi hui a i ʻole ke kahawai—e loaʻa i nā mea āpau ka leka hoʻomaopopo maʻalahi.
telegram.botUnlink: Wehe i ka loulou o ka bot
telegram.errEnterToken: E hoʻokomo i ka hōʻailona bot
telegram.successSavedWithBroadcast: ✓ Ua mālama ʻia ʻo Bot @{{username}}. Hoʻouna ʻia ke aloha i nā mea kākau inoa ʻo {{sent}}.
telegram.successSavedNoBroadcast: ✓ Ua mālama ʻia ʻo Bot @{{username}}. E loaʻa i nā mea a pau e leka uila iā ia /start nā leka hoʻomaopopo.
telegram.successTestSingle: ✓ Ua hāʻawi ʻia ka leka. E nānā i ke Telegram.
telegram.successTestMany: ✓ Ua hāʻawi ʻia ka leka i nā mea loaʻa {{count}}. E ʻoluʻolu e nānā i ka Telegram.
telegram.testTooltip: Hoʻouna i kahi leka hoʻomaopopo hoʻāʻo ma o ka bot
telegram.confirmUnlinkTitle: Wehe i ka loulou o ka bot?
telegram.confirmUnlinkBody: E wehe ʻia aku nō hoʻi nā mea kākau inoa - e pau nā leka hoʻomaopopo.
telegram.lastBroadcast: Leka uila hou loa: i hāʻawi ʻia ʻo {{sent}} mai {{total}}

imageModel.heading: Image generation model
imageModel.lead: Single model for the whole account, used ONLY for image generation/editing in Quest Flow. Translation and recognition keep their own model.
imageModel.needKey: E mālama a hōʻoia mua i ke kī API — pono ia no ka hana kiʻi.
imageModel.hint: Hana ʻo Nano Banana i ka hana ʻana, ka hoʻoponopono ʻana a me ka haku mele ʻana. Hoʻopuka wale ʻo Imagen mai ka wā ʻole.

prompt.heading: Nā Manaʻo Kōkua
prompt.subtitle: Prompt a me ka waihona ʻike no ka hoʻololi ʻana ma nā lumi wikiō wale nō
prompt.warning: ʻAʻole e huikau me Quest Flow
prompt.kbLabel: Waihona ʻike (pōʻaiapili o ka ʻoihana, FAQ, nā ʻoiaʻiʻo)
prompt.showDefault: He aha ka mea a ka AI e hoʻohana ai ma ka maʻamau?
prompt.appendNote: Hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻohui i kāu mau lula ponoʻī - e hui pū ʻia lākou me nā mea paʻamau.
prompt.headerLeadBold1: no ka wehe ʻana i nā leka i loko o nā lumi wikiō wale nō
prompt.headerLeadPart2: - ke kaomi ʻoe i kahi leka ma kahi kamaʻilio a koho i kahi leo
prompt.contextLeadPart1: Hoʻohana ʻia ke kaomi ʻoe i kahi leka ma kahi kamaʻilio lumi wikiō a koho i kahi leo
prompt.contextLeadPart2: Ua hui pū ʻia ke kahua ʻike (ma lalo).
prompt.defaultSummary: ʻO ka mea a ka AI e hoʻohana ai ma ka paʻamau (inā hakahaka kāu kahua) - kaomi e nānā
prompt.extendNoteText: me kā lākou mau lula/ʻano/huaʻōlelo ponoʻī - e hui pū ʻia lākou me ka Prompt paʻamau ma luna a me ke kahua ʻike.
prompt.errLoadSettings: ʻAʻole i hiki ke hoʻouka i nā hoʻonohonoho
prompt.kbHeading: Ka Waihona ʻIke — TXT / Word / Excel / CSV
prompt.kbLead: Hoʻouka i kahi palapala—papa inoa, FAQ, papa inoa kumukūʻai, nā lula, a i ʻole nā mea kōkua. Hoʻokaʻawale ʻia ka ʻike ma ke kikowaena (Word/Excel/CSV → kikokikona) a hoʻohui ʻia e ka AI i ka wā e kākau ana i nā leka i loko o nā lumi wikiō. Palena: 50 MB faila / 500,000 mau huapalapala i loko o ka waihona ʻikepili.
prompt.successFileUploaded: Ua hoʻouka ʻia ka waihona "{{filename}}" ({{format}}) - ua mālama ʻia nā huapalapala {{kbLength}}.
prompt.successFileTruncated: Ua hoʻokiʻoki ʻia ka ʻike i nā huapalapala {{max}}.
prompt.successKbCleared: Ua hoʻomaʻemaʻe ʻia ke kahua ʻike.
prompt.errLoadFile: ʻAʻole i hiki ke hoʻouka i ka faila
prompt.confirmKbDeleteBody: E nalo aku nā palapala a pau i hoʻouka ʻia. ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻihoʻi ʻia kēia hana.
prompt.presetsHeading: Nā leo wehewehe i hiki ke loaʻa
prompt.presetsLeadPart1: Ma ke kamaʻilio ʻana o ka Enterprise Room, hiki iā ʻoe ke hōʻike i kekahi leka a noi i ka AI e wehewehe iā ia ma ke kani i koho ʻia. Pihi
prompt.presetsLeadPart2: hoʻohana i kāu Prompt mai ke kahua ma luna.

questFlow.heading: Quest Flow
questFlow.subtitle: Nā pane AI i nā mea kūʻai aku ma o nā bots Telegram a me Inbound API
questFlow.warning: Inā hakahaka ke kahua, hoʻohana ʻia ka Prompt VibeVox maʻamau.
questFlow.headerLead: Kamaʻilio AI me kēlā me kēia mea kūʻai aku ma o kahi bot Telegram i pili iā Quest Flow.
questFlow.keysLead: He mea huna kēlā me kēia kī āu e hoʻokomo ai i loko o ka poloka HTTP Quest Flow o ke kaulahao. Hoʻohana ʻo VibeVox iā ia e ʻike i kāu moʻokāki. Hiki iā ʻoe ke hana i nā kī he nui no nā kaulahao like ʻole.
questFlow.keyLabelPlaceholder: Lepili (koho), no ka laʻana: "Prod bot clinic"
questFlow.createdWarning: ⚠ E mālama i ke kī - hoʻokahi wale nō manawa e hōʻike ʻia ai
questFlow.savedKeyConfirm: Ua mālama au i ke kī
questFlow.noKeysHint: ʻAʻohe kī i kēia manawa. E hana i ka mea mua.
questFlow.confirmRevokeBody: E pau ka hana ʻana o Quest Flow ma o ia mea.
questFlow.promptLead1: Hoʻoholo i ke ʻano o ka kamaʻilio ʻana o AI me nā mea kūʻai aku ma o Quest Flow: ke ʻano, ke kaila, nā mea e ʻike ai.
questFlow.promptLead2: — hoʻohana ʻia ka Prompt VibeVox maʻamau (ma lalo).
questFlow.promptLeadBold2: Inā ʻoe e hoʻopiha i kāu
questFlow.promptLead3: - e hui pū ʻia me ka Prompt kumu a me ka waihona ʻike.
questFlow.defaultSummary: ʻO ka mea a ka AI e hoʻohana ai ma ka paʻamau (inā hakahaka kāu kahua) - kaomi e nānā
questFlow.successPromptSaved: Ua mālama ʻia ka Prompt Quest Flow.
questFlow.kbLead1: Nā Palapala - papa inoa lawelawe, papa inoa kumukūʻai, FAQ. Hoʻouka i ka TXT / Word / Excel / CSV.
questFlow.kbLead2: — ʻaʻole e loaʻa i ka AI nā ʻikepili o ka ʻoihana; e pane wale ia ma muli o ka ʻike maʻamau. ʻO kēia kumu
questFlow.kbLead3: Mai ka ʻāpana "Nā Manaʻo Kōkua"—no ke kākau ʻana i ke wikiō. Palena: faila 50 MB / 500,000 mau huapalapala i loko o ka waihona ʻikepili.
questFlow.successFileUploaded: Ua hoʻouka ʻia ka faila "{{filename}}" ({{kbLength}} mau huapalapala).
questFlow.successKbCleared: Ua hoʻomaʻemaʻe ʻia ke kahua ʻike.
questFlow.confirmKbDeleteBody: E hoʻomaʻemaʻe ʻia ka waihona ʻike Quest Flow. ʻAʻole hiki ke hoʻihoʻi ʻia kēia hana.
questFlow.tagsLead: Hāʻawi ka AI i kēia mau lepili i nā mea kūʻai aku inā ʻike ia i kahi kūlike i ke kamaʻilio ʻana. Hōʻike ʻia nā lepili ma ke kāleka lumi o ka mea kūʻai aku a hoʻouna ʻia i ka CRM (Māhele 4).
questFlow.confirmDeleteBody: E holoi mau loa ʻia ke kī. E pau ka hana ʻana o Quest Flow ma o ia — pono ʻoe e hana i kahi kī hou a hoʻololi iā ia i ke kaulahao.

chatwoot.heading: Hoʻohui ʻana o CRM (Chatwoot)
chatwoot.subtitle: E hoʻouna koke i ka mōʻaukala kelepona a me nā lepili iā Chatwoot.
chatwoot.headerLead: Hoʻoili i ka mōʻaukala kamaʻilio a me nā lepili pono o ka mea kūʻai aku iā Chatwoot CRM
chatwoot.urlFieldLabel: URL Chatwoot (hoʻokipa ponoʻī a i ʻole app.chatwoot.com)
chatwoot.tokenFieldLabel: Hōʻailona Komo ʻAgent (mai ka Profile → Hōʻailona Komo)
chatwoot.testSuccess: Ke hana nei ka pilina - ke pane mai nei ʻo Chatwoot.
chatwoot.successSaved: Ua mālama ʻia. I kēia manawa, kaomi iā "Test Connection" e nānā.
chatwoot.errLoad: ʻAʻole i hiki ke hoʻouka i nā hoʻonohonoho
chatwoot.whatSentHeading: He aha ka mea i hoʻouna ʻia ma Chatwoot
chatwoot.whatSentItem1: Hoʻokaʻaʻike me ka mea kūʻai aku (e telegram_user_id, me custom_attributes)
chatwoot.whatSentItem2: Kamaʻilio me kahi memo pilikino = mōʻaukala kamaʻilio piha
chatwoot.whatSentItem3Prefix: Nā lepili pono a pau i hāʻawi ʻia ma
chatwoot.whatSentFooter: Hoʻouna ʻia ke kaomi lima ʻoe iā "Hoʻouna iā CRM" ma ke kamaʻilio lumi. ʻO ka hoʻouna ʻakomi ke ʻike ʻia ka tag ka hiʻohiʻona aʻe.

imagePresets.heading: Image processing blocks
imagePresets.lead: Each block is a preset: a function + prompt + (optional) reference images. The bot button in Quest Flow sends this preset's key, and VibeVox transforms the image with exactly this preset — the AI chooses nothing.
imagePresets.modelHint: change it in the Gemini API section
imagePresets.empty: No blocks yet. Add the first one.
imagePresets.confirmDeleteBody: The block will be removed after you save.
imagePresets.labelPlaceholder: Block name, e.g. “Try on our jacket”
imagePresets.presetKeyLabel: Preset key (paste into the Quest Flow button)
imagePresets.promptExtraLabel: Extra prompt (added to the function's base prompt)
imagePresets.intakeLabel: How the bot asks the client for inputs
imagePresets.intakePlaceholder: e.g. Send a full-height photo of yourself
imagePresets.replyCaptionPlaceholder: Text sent to the client together with the image
imagePresets.referenceHint: Fixed images always added to this block's generation.
imagePresets.referenceMaxHint: Up to {{max}} images for the current model.

mcp.heading: MCP — connect external AI agents / CRM
mcp.lead: Generate an individual key and connect this account to any MCP-compatible agent (Claude, ChatGPT connectors, n8n, your own agent). Two-way: read leads/dialogs and perform actions.
mcp.urlHint: Paste this URL + the key into your agent's MCP settings.
mcp.keysLead: Each key is bound to this account and carries the scopes you select. The raw key is shown once.
mcp.createdWarning: Copy the key now — it is shown only once.
mcp.noKeys: No keys yet. Create the first one.
mcp.confirmDeleteBody: Agents using this key will lose access immediately.
mcp.howToBody: In your agent/CRM add a remote MCP server: the URL above + header Authorization: Bearer <your key>. The agent sees only the tools your scopes allow.

billingPage.tierStandardSummary: No nā hui a me nā mea kūkākūkā ikaika
billingPage.tierEnterpriseSummary: Pūʻulu AI piha no ka ʻoihana
billingPage.featureCountWithMinutes: {{count}} minuke o ka unuhi ʻana i kēlā me kēia mahina

billingPage.featureAllStandard: Mai Standard mai nā mea a pau

billingPage.featureRollover: E lawe ana i nā minuke i ka mahina aʻe
billingPage.featureCRM: Nā kāleka mea kūʻai aku me ka ʻike ponoʻī
billingPage.featureTelegramAuth: Telegram-ʻae ʻia + ka loulou ʻana i kahi kāleka
billingPage.featureCalendar: Google Calendar - Nā Hoʻonohonoho Mea kūʻai aku
billingPage.featureSmartTags: Ke kau inoa akamai ʻana i nā pono
billingPage.featureCRMExport: Hoʻokuʻu aku i ka CRM (Chatwoot + API)
billingPage.whatsAppMessage: Aloha! Makemake au i ka hoʻolālā Enterprise VibeVox.
billingPage.searchLanguagesPlaceholder: E huli i kāu ʻōlelo - no ka laʻana, "Portuguese", "português", ru
billingPage.faqQ1: He aha ka mea e hana ʻia i nā minuke i hoʻohana ʻole ʻia?
billingPage.faqA1: E lawe ʻia nā minuke i hoʻohana ʻole ʻia i ka mahina aʻe. Pau lākou i ke kolu o ka mahina.
billingPage.faqQ2: Hiki iaʻu ke hoʻōki i kaʻu kau inoa i kēlā me kēia manawa?
billingPage.faqA2: ʻAe. Hiki iā ʻoe ke hoʻopau i kāu moʻokāki pilikino me hoʻokahi kaomi. E hoʻomau ka manawa i uku mua ʻia a hiki i kona hopena.
billingPage.faqQ3: He aha nā mea i loko o Enterprise?
billingPage.faqA3: Pūʻulu AI piha: nā kāleka mea kūʻai aku me ka ʻike ponoʻī, ka ʻae ʻana o Telegram, nā Prompt pilikino, Google Calendar, ka hōʻailona pono akamai, ka hoʻokuʻu aku ʻana o CRM, ka hoʻohui ʻana me questflow.pro, a me kahi pā admin ʻokoʻa.
billingPage.faqQ4: ʻO wai ka mea lawelawe kelepona SIP āu e pono ai?
billingPage.faqA4: ʻO kēlā me kēia RFC-compliant: Zadarma, OnlinePBX, Asterisk/FreePBX, etc. Hoʻokumu ʻo VibeVox i kahi outbound Trunk aunoa.
billingPage.faqHeading: Nā Nīnau i Nīnau Pinepine ʻia
billingPage.topupTitle: Ke kūʻai ʻana i nā minuke hou aʻe
billingPage.topupDescription: €0.17 i kēlā me kēia minuke. Mai 60 mau minuke a i 10 mau hola. Hāʻawi koke ʻia ke kālā ma hope o ka uku ʻana.
billingPage.discountWithPromo: me ka hoʻēmi o -{{percent}}% me ke code promo {{code}}
billingPage.cancelDetailActiveUntil: E mau ana ka hana o ke kau inoa a hiki i ka {{date}}.
billingPage.cancelDetailMinutesAvailable: Loaʻa nā minuke uku a hiki i kēia lā; hiki ke kūʻai ʻia nā minuke hou aʻe.
billingPage.cancelDetailAutoClose: Ma hope iho, e pani ʻia ke kau inoa ʻana me ka ʻakomi.
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHeading: Ua hoʻopau ʻia ka hoʻohou hou ʻana · e pani ʻia ke kau inoa {{date}}
billingPage.autoRenewCancelledHint: Loaʻa nā minuke o kāu hoʻolālā a hiki i kēia lā; hiki iā ʻoe ke kūʻai i nā minuke hou aʻe. Kaomi iā "Hoʻomau" inā hoʻololi ʻoe i kou manaʻo.
billingPage.yearlySavings: E mālama i ka €59 i kēlā me kēia makahiki (2 mahina manuahi)
billingPage.languagesLead: He papa inoa piha o nā ʻōlelo i kākoʻo ʻia e ka unuhi manawa like. ʻIke ʻakomi i ka ʻōlelo kumu—koho kēlā me kēia mea komo i kā lākou ʻōlelo makuahine.
billingPage.languagesNoResults: ʻAʻole i loaʻa ka ʻōlelo ma ka papa inoa o nā mea i kākoʻo ʻia.
billingPage.languagesNoResultsHint: E hoʻāʻo i kahi pela ʻokoʻa—no ka laʻana, ma ka ʻōlelo Pelekania a i ʻole ka pīʻāpā kūloko. Inā nalowale maoli ka ʻōlelo, e hoʻomaopopo mai iā mākou, a na mākou e hoʻohui.

seo.title: VibeVox — Unuhi AI manawa maoli no nā kelepona wikiō a me SIP
seo.description: He kahua unuhi leo i hoʻohana ʻia e AI i ka manawa like ʻo VibeVox e kākoʻo ana i nā ʻōlelo he 100+. Loaʻa nā kelepona wikiō, ke kelepona SIP, ke kamaʻilio mea kūʻai aku, a me ka loiloi kamaʻilio i hoʻohana ʻia e AI.
seo.keywords: Unuhi AI, unuhi like, kelepona wikiō me ka unuhi, kelepona SIP, unuhi leo

footer.poweredBy: Unuhi i hoʻohana ʻia e AI

pwaInstall.name: VibeVox
pwaInstall.description: He unuhi AI like ʻo VibeVox no nā kelepona leo a me ke wikiō ma 108 mau ʻōlelo. Hana ʻo WebRTC a me SIP kelepona, mea kōkua leo, a me ka unuhi manawa maoli ma kekahi hāmeʻa.
pwaInstall.installCta: E hoʻohui iā VibeVox i kāu pale home—nā kelepona me ka unuhi, SIP, a me kahi mea kōkua AI i hoʻokahi pā. Hana e like me kahi polokalamu kūloko.
pwaInstall.buttonSubtitle: E hele i ka pale home - hoʻomaka i hoʻokahi pā
pwaInstall.buttonAria: E hoʻouka iā VibeVox ma ke ʻano he polokalamu
